# remnawave_user (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave VPN user.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `expire_at` (String) Expiration date in ISO 8601 format.
- `username` (String) Unique username (3-36 chars, alphanumeric + _ -).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `email` (String) User email address.
- `hwid_device_limit` (Number) Max hardware devices allowed.
- `ss_password` (String, Sensitive) Shadowsocks password (8-32 chars). Auto-generated if not set.
- `status` (String) User status: ACTIVE or DISABLED. LIMITED/EXPIRED are managed by the panel.
- `tag` (String) User tag (uppercase letters, numbers, underscores; max 16).
- `telegram_id` (Number) Telegram user ID for notifications.
- `traffic_limit_bytes` (Number) Traffic limit in bytes. 0 = unlimited.
- `traffic_limit_strategy` (String) Reset strategy: NO_RESET, DAY, WEEK, MONTH, MONTH_ROLLING.
- `trojan_password` (String, Sensitive) Trojan protocol password (8-32 chars). Auto-generated if not set.
- `vless_uuid` (String) VLESS UUID. Auto-generated if not set.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the user.
- `short_uuid` (String) Short UUID used in subscription URLs.
- `subscription_url` (String) Subscription URL for the user.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the user (assigned by the panel).
